data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Conagra Brands After Q3 Results
data.description: Conagra Brands Inc. (NYSE: CAG) disclosed their third-quarter results, revealing adjusted earnings of 39 cents per share - falling short of the expected 40 cents. Sales reached $2.79 billion, slightly declining by 1.9% compared to the previous year, yet surpassing forecasts of $2.76 billion. For fiscal 2026, Conagra adjusted their earnings guidance to approximately $1.70 per share, just under the anticipated $1.72. The company anticipates its adjusted operating margin to settle at the upper end of the 11.0% to 11.5% range. CEO Sean Connolly expressed satisfaction with the quarter's performance, noting a return to organic net sales growth with positive trends in the Frozen and Snacks sectors while maintaining progress in cash businesses amidst a dynamic market.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On Penguin Solutions Following Q2 Results
data.description: Penguin Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: PENG) released its second-quarter results, showcasing strong performance and a positive outlook for the full year. Despite a 6% decline in net sales to $343 million compared to the previous year, the figure surpassed the projected $337.938 million. The adjusted EPS stood at 52 cents, exceeding the estimated 42 cents, while the GAAP diluted EPS surged from 9 cents to 58 cents. CEO Kash Shaikh highlighted the growing demand for AI technologies among enterprises, governments, and neocloud providers, leading to an expansion in their AI/HPC pipeline. The company welcomed five new AI/HPC clients during the quarter, including a prominent financial institution adopting their MemoryAI™ CXL-based KV solution. This information is accessible for further details.

data.title: The Presidio Group Exclusively Advises Dream Motor Group on the Acquisition of Two Florida Dealerships from Bill Seidle’s Automotive Group
data.description: In Doral, Florida, the Presidio Group LLC served as the exclusive advisor to Dream Motor Group on the acquisition of Bill Seidle’s Nissan and Bill Seidle’s Mitsubishi from Bill Seidle’s Automotive Group. This deal, which involved the purchase of two neighboring dealerships along with their real estate, was finalized on April 1. The Presidio Group LLC specializes in mergers and acquisitions, capital raising, and investments within the automotive retail and consumer mobility industries.
Iran's Foreign Minister: Striking civilian structures, including unfinished bridges, will not compel Iranians to surrender.

data.title: The Sleep Coach Who's Telling You to Put Down Your Sleep Tracker
data.description: Jack Dell'Accio, founder of Essentia Organic Mattress, has revealed that high performers could be hindering their recovery, even with the use of blue light glasses. Dell'Accio explains how certain sleep habits may be restricting individuals from fully recovering. The information was shared by Dell'Accio, shedding light on the potential setbacks faced by individuals aiming for high performance. The insights were provided during an event in Boca Raton, Florida, on April 2, 2026.

data.title: HelloNation Explains Auto Insurance Amarillo Choices With Insights From Insurance Expert Jamie Smith
data.description: News from Amarillo, Texas on April 2, 2026 reveals valuable information on selecting auto insurance coverage. The article discusses various coverage options, legal mandates, and practical considerations affecting policy decisions in Amarillo. Before choosing auto insurance, drivers must be aware of key aspects such as coverage options, legal requirements, and practical factors. HelloNation recently published this informative piece to help drivers make smarter policy decisions when selecting auto insurance in Amarillo.

data.title: National Safety Council Urges Drivers to 'Just Drive' This Distracted Driving Awareness Month
data.description: In April 2026, the National Safety Council is observing Distracted Driving Awareness Month by emphasizing the preventability of distracted driving crashes. Drivers are urged to take basic, prompt actions to safeguard themselves and others on the road. This initiative aims to reduce the staggering number of accidents caused by distractions, highlighting the importance of staying focused while driving.

data.title: The American Train Dispatchers Association and Union Pacific Railroad Reach Agreement to Protect Union Jobs for Life
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, the American Train Dispatchers Association (ATDA) and Union Pacific Railroad have finalized a groundbreaking agreement. This accord ensures that union employees will have lifetime job security following the merger of Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern, forming the nation's inaugural single-line, coast-to-coast railway. This pact is a significant development in partnership with Union Pacific, guaranteeing current employees at the time of the merger jobs for life, subject to standard conditions. This agreement with ATDA is the most recent in a series of agreements that Union Pacific has made to secure the employment future of its workforce, marking a milestone in the railway industry.

data.title: Save A Lot recognizes 10 Retail Partners at Annual Meeting
data.description: Save A Lot, a prominent discount grocery chain in the United States, recently revealed the achievements of 10 Retail Partners. The names of the honored owners and operators were disclosed at the company’s yearly Retail Partner Awards event in St. Charles, Missouri. The awards ceremony, held during the annual meeting and food show for store owners and operators, highlighted outstanding performance in the year 2025 in various vital areas. This recognition aimed to celebrate excellence in key categories within the company.

data.title: TISC Makes a Full-Court Press Ahead of Final Four, Appoints Richard “Scooter” Barry as Vice President of Sports
data.description: San Francisco-based technology company TISC is intensifying efforts leading up to the Final Four by appointing Richard “Scooter” Barry as Vice President of Sports. The company is focusing on enhancing its sports division as it gears up for the upcoming event.

data.title: Fortive Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Fortive Corporation, listed on the NYSE as FTV, disclosed plans to host a webcast for its Q1 2026 earnings conference on April 30, 2026, starting at 12:00 p.m. ET for about one hour. The webcast, inclusive of a presentation, will be available on Fortive’s website under the "Investors" section at www.fortive.com in the "News & Events" category. To join the call, individuals can dial 877-407-3110 in the U.S. or +1 215-2.

data.title: WellStack Partners with Healthcare Systems of America to Establish a Unified Data Foundation and Enable Enterprise Analytics
data.description: Located in Madison, Wisconsin, WellStack, a healthcare data platform tailored for analytics and AI integration, has unveiled a new strategic alliance today with Healthcare Systems of America (HSA). HSA, a top hospital services provider for health systems in acute and specialty care settings across the nation, is joining forces with the aim of harnessing data, analytics, and AI capabilities for enhanced operational insights and financial decision-making. The partnership, spanning multiple years, highlights a collective goal to leverage technology for better healthcare outcomes.

data.title: Calix Named Among Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For as Agentic Leadership Advances
data.description: Calix, Inc. revealed that it has secured the 85th spot on the prestigious Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® 2026 list. Additionally, the company was distinguished as 21st in the Best Large Workplaces in Tech category, 18th in the Bay Area, and 67th for Parents. These rankings highlight Calix’s dedication to fostering a customer-centric culture and the rapid growth of its business. Established 26 years ago to cater to communications service providers (CSPs), Calix has transformed into a software-focused company over the last 15 years.

data.title: OpenbooQ Officially Goes Live in Dayton; Announces Patrick Salyers as Co-CEO and Reports Homeowner Savings of Over 40%
data.description: Residents in Dayton now have access to innovative AI-powered roofing solutions that can be purchased directly from the manufacturer. OpenbooQ, a cutting-edge roofing platform, has launched its services in the area. Customers can enjoy guaranteed professional installation and comprehensive warranties for their roofs. This development follows the launch of the platform on April 2, 2026, indicating a significant advancement in roofing technology for the region.

data.title: Lamb Weston Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q3 Results
data.description: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) reported robust third-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of 72 cents, exceeding the anticipated 61 cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.565 billion, beating the expected $1.492 billion. Lamb Weston revised its 2026 sales guidance to $6.45 billion - $6.55 billion from the previous range of $6.35 billion - $6.55 billion. The updated adjusted EBITDA outlook is $1.08 billion - $1.14 billion, compared to the previous $1 billion - $1.20 billion. CEO Mike mentioned, "Our operational efficiency and cost control efforts are yielding positive results, with expectations to surpass the $250 million cost reduction target by fiscal year-end 2028."

data.title: Hitachi Energy to expand its U.S. footprint with $10 million USD investment and 150 new jobs to meet surging electricity demand
data.description: A newly established Power Electronics Center of Excellence in Cary, North Carolina, is set to focus on engineering, testing, and system integration to assist with extensive energy initiatives throughout North America. With a significant investment, this center aims to expedite the process of bringing projects to fruition, enhance power reliability for utility companies, and optimize AI data utilization.
